title: Turmoil in the Capital
description: You've arrived in Falkenhaften to find the capital in chaos. The King has been missing for nearly fifty years, and now a mysterious elven woman has appeared claiming to be his long-lost lover, accompanied by a young man she says is the true heir to the throne. The secret society contact asks you to investigate her claims - something doesn't add up.

objectives.description: Meet with your contact in the Hidden Quarter
Gather information about the elven claimant
Observe the supposed heir at the palace
Report your findings to your contact
